mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.board_id AS boardId, c.member_id AS memberId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, m.nickname AS nickName FROM comment c INNER JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_id, c.id), c.parent_id IS NOT NULL, c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (board_id, member_id, parent_id, content) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{memberId}, NULL, #{content})
INSERT INTO comment (board_id, member_id, parent_id, content) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{parentId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT member_id FROM comment WHERE id = #{id}
